name: shen-web-tools
description: Research assistant: Shen logic on CL/SBCL backend, Arrow.js generative UI frontend

scripts.shen-derive: npx tsx ../../cmd/shen-derive-ts/shen-derive.ts verify specs/shen-derive-smoke.shen --func sum-nonneg --impl-module ./sum_nonneg.js --impl-func SumNonneg --import ./guards_gen.js --out runtime/sum_nonneg.shen-derive.test.ts
scripts.shen-derive-check: npx tsx ../../cmd/shen-derive-ts/shen-derive.ts verify specs/shen-derive-smoke.shen --func sum-nonneg --impl-module ./sum_nonneg.js --impl-func SumNonneg --import ./guards_gen.js --out runtime/.sum_nonneg.shen-derive.test.ts.new && diff -u runtime/sum_nonneg.shen-derive.test.ts runtime/.sum_nonneg.shen-derive.test.ts.new && rm runtime/.sum_nonneg.shen-derive.test.ts.new
scripts.check: npm run shengen && npm run shen-derive-check && npm run build && npm test
